ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the unit of data (e.g., tweet) */,
  "golden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is a golden record (used for verification) */,
  "unit_state" TEXT /* State of the unit (e.g., golden, active) */,
  "trusted_judgments" INTEGER /* Number of trusted judgments on the post */,
  "last_judgment_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last judgment made on the post */,
  "choose_one" TEXT /* Classification of the post (e.g., Relevant, Irrelevant) */,
  "choose_one_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the classification */,
  "choose_one_gold" TEXT /* Gold standard classification of the post */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the post (e.g., earthquake, fire) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location mentioned in the post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tweet (if the post is from Twitter) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user who posted the content */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was originally published */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Source platform of the post (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL to the original post for reference */,
  "post_language" TEXT /* Language of the post */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, moderator, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judgments" (
  "judgment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judgment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being judged */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user making the judgment */,
  "judgment_type" TEXT /* Type of judgment (e.g., Relevant, Irrelevant) */,
  "judgment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the judgment was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the judgment */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who verified the judgment */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the judgment was verified */,
  "verification_confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judgment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judgments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judgments_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judgments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crisis_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crisis event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the crisis event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of crisis (e.g., earthquake, fire) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the crisis */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the crisis */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the crisis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the crisis (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crisis event */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crisis (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* ID of the team responsible for the response */,
  "estimated_impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the crisis (e.g., number of people affected) */,
  "resources_allocated" TEXT /* Resources allocated for the crisis response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_crisis_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post related to the crisis */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crisis event */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the post to the crisis event */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the relationship has been verified */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who verified the relationship */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_crisis_relationships_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_crisis_relationships_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_crisis_relationships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES crisis_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the crisis event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crisis event */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the keyword to the crisis event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES crisis_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crisis event */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES crisis_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., judgment, verification) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., judgment, verification, report generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
